title: Passive voice — key word transformation
target_form: Passive voice across tenses, including modal and going-to passives
methodology_notes: Cambridge FCE Use of English Part 4 format: 2–5 word window, given key word unchanged, meaning preserved.

exercises.rubric: Complete the second sentence using the word in capitals so that it has a similar meaning to the first. Use between 2 and 5 words.

items.source: They are going to build a new bridge here.
items.explanation: Active 'be going to' becomes passive: subject + 'is/are going to be' + past participle.
